title: Furnace Progress
description: See at a glance how many items have been smelted and how far the current item is.
body:
## 🔥 Furnace Progress
**This data pack / mod helps you see how many items the furnace has already smelted and how far the current item has been smelted.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VUCSCKPSeIE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To get the indicator, you must place the furnace directly in front of you! If you don't want the indicator, place the furnace at least two blocks away from you. If you dismantle the furnace, the indicator will also disappear.

## 📚 How to Install the Datapack
### 👤 Singleplayer
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the ```"\.minecraft\saves\YOURWORLD\datapacks"``` folder.
Now enter your world. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
### 👥 Multiplayer (Server)
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the datapack folder, which is located in the default "world" folder.
Now join your server. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
